logger.doc:name: Creating a new meal
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal creation started' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealType: vars.request.mealType, itemCount: sizeOf(vars.request.items) } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Meals

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal created successfully' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealId: vars.mealId, } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- vars.request.items map (item)->{ foodId: item.foodId, mode: if (item.quantityG != null) "B" else "A", portionId: item.portionId default null, portionAmount: item.portionAmount default null, quantityG: item.quantityG default null }

logger.doc:name: Creating meal items
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json var logMessage ='Meal item creation started' var userId = { userId: vars.userId as String, mealType: vars.request.mealType, payload:payload } import buildLog from dwl::log --- buildLog("INFO",logMessage,userId, vars.correlationId , vars.flowName)]

db:select.doc:name: Retreive Food Weight
db:select.db:sql: SELECT gram_weight FROM food_portions where id = :id

set-variable.value: #[%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (payload[0].gram_weight as Number) * (vars.currentItem.portionAmount as Number)]
set-variable.doc:name: Computed Quantity G

db:insert.doc:name: Insert Food Items
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ food_id: vars.currentItem.foodId, portion_id: vars.currentItem.portionId, portion_amount:vars.currentItem.portionAmount, meal_id: vars.meal_id default vars.mealId, quantity_g:vars.computedQuantityG }]

db:select.doc:name: Select full meal with items
db:select.db:sql: SELECT m.meal_id, m.user_id, m.meal_type, m.consumed_at, m.logged_at as meal_logged_at, mi.item_id, mi.food_id, mi.portion_id, mi.portion_amount, mi.quantity_g, mi.logged_at as item_logged_at FROM meals m JOIN meal_items mi ON m.meal_id = mi.meal_id WHERE m.meal_id = :mealId AND m.deleted_at IS NULL AND mi.deleted_at IS NULL

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json import transformMeal from dwl::transforms --- transformMeal(payload)

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 import * from dw::core::Arrays output application/java --- vars.request.items some (item)-> (item.portionId != null and item.quantityG != null) or (item.portionId == null and item.portionAmount == null and item.quantityG == null)

validation:is-false.doc:name: Check Meal Id
validation:is-false.message: Invalid meal Id format. Must be a valid UUID.

db:select.doc:name: Select Meals
db:select.db:sql: SELECT meal_id FROM meals WHERE meal_id = :mealId AND user_id = :userId AND deleted_at IS NULL

validation:is-false.message: Invalid Request. Each item must use (portionId + portionAmount) or (quantityG)
